name: free-deepseek-api
description: OpenAI-compatible local API proxy for DeepSeek Web chat

scripts.studio:build: npm --prefix dashboard install && npm --prefix dashboard run build
scripts.test: node --check server.js && node --check studio-server.js && node --check scripts/auth.js && node --check scripts/auth_import.js && node --check scripts/doctor.js && node --check scripts/deepseek_chrome_auth.js && node --check scripts/probe_deepseek_models.js && node --check scripts/check-docs.js && node --check client.js && node --check agent.js && node --check lib/agent-core.js && node --check lib/project-index.js && node --check scripts/live_agentic_smoke_tests.mjs && node scripts/check-docs.js && node --test tests/unit.test.js
